title: Central government clears appointment of Justice SA Dharmadhikari as Chief Justice of Madras High Court
description: The Central government on Thursday approved the appointment of Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari as the Chief Justice of the Madras High Court.Union Minister in charge of Law and Justice Arjun Ram Meghwal took to X (formerly Twitter) to confirm the appointment. In exercise of the power conferred by the Constitution of India, the President of India, after consultation with the Chief Justice of India, is pleased to appoint Shri Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari, Judge of the High Court of Ke
